bugs.title: Task Queue panel shows placeholder when no tasks configured
bugs.description: The task queue panel renders 'Not Wired' even when backend has task data available

bugs.title: Memory data lost on server restart
bugs.description: MemoryService is purely in-memory. All semantic, episodic, and working memory is lost when the backend restarts

bugs.title: Duplicate return statement in tasks/create endpoint
bugs.description: The POST /v1/tasks/create endpoint has two identical return statements, the second is dead code

bugs.title: No rate limiting on API endpoints
bugs.description: All API endpoints are unauthenticated (except auth-protected ones) and have no rate limiting, making them vulnerable to abuse

bugs.title: WebSocket reconnects don't resubscribe to channels
bugs.description: After a WebSocket disconnect and reconnect, the client doesn't automatically resubscribe to previous channels
